content:
Military Town — Mirrors the Second Person found in “Available in Standard Sizes,” but from the other end of the spectrum; the narrator speaking already experienced the future and sorts through nostalgia as opposed to the narrator from the first piece who is imagining their future.

Iconography —



Have you considered implementing other more external perspectives into the collection? The voices of mothers, fathers, and lovers
context: From document: Tomb of the Unknowns Notes — chunk 4 (chunk 4/4)
